svg.title: Deployment and Rollback Decision Flow
svg.desc: Shows the deployment lifecycle from pre-deploy checks through verification and the three rollback strategies

color: rgb(1, 87, 155) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Pre-deploy checklist
§6.1: image exists, pods healthy,
backup DB, record current tag

div.style: color: rgb(1, 87, 155) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Deploy via Jenkins pipeline
§6.2: gke_CI → deploy.sh

div.style: color: rgb(1, 87, 155) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(1, 87, 155) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Post-deploy verification
§6.3: health, migration,
errors, smoke test

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(183, 28, 28) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
kubectl rollout undo
§6.4: reverts to previous RS

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(183, 28, 28) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Emergency image pinning
§6.4: kubectl set image
to known-good tag

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(183, 28, 28) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Alembic downgrade -1
§6.4: coordinate with dev team

div.style: color: rgb(1, 87, 155) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
